channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The Boys: Trigger Warning launches March 26 for Quest, later for PS VR2
item.content:encoded:
• PS VR2
  • PS5
  • Quest

Become a Supe in the first official The Boys video game.

The Boys: Trigger Warning, a virtual reality stealth action game based on The Boys multi-Emmy Award-winning television series, will launch for Quest on March 26 for $23.99, publisher Sony Pictures Virtual Reality and developer ARVORE announced. The PlayStation VR2 version will follow at a later date.

“Creating a game set in The Boys universe, our team focused on delivering an experience that felt authentic to the show while giving players a true superhero experience that wouldn’t be possible outside of [virtual reality],” said ARVORE chief creative officer Ricardo Laganaro in a prss release. “Thanks to Sony Pictures Entertainment and the show creators, we’ve created something incredibly rare to see in game adaptations for such iconic [intellectual properties]. We can’t wait to see how fans interact with the story and characters we’ve added to this franchise.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Sony Pictures Virtual Reality:

Developed with the creators and featuring voice performances by Laz Alonso (Mother’s Milk), Jensen Ackles (Soldier Boy), Colby Minifie (Ashley Barrett), and P.J. Byrne (Adam Bourke), The Boys: Trigger Warning drops you directly into the gloriously twisted world of The Boys. This time, you’re not watching the chaos—you’re in it: close-up, personal, and dangerously real. Lucas Costa’s life detonates when the Armstrongs—a washed-up but still lethal family of Vought Superheroes—turn a family outing into carnage. The Boys drag Lucas back from the brink, juice him with powers, and throw him headfirst into their underground fight against Vought and its Supes. With Butcher and Mother’s Milk guiding from the shadows, Lucas sets off on a no-mercy hunt to put the Armstrongs in the ground.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-boys-trigger-warning-launches-march-26-for-quest-later-for-ps-vr2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PowerWash Simulator 2 version 1.2 update now available, adds ‘Miniature Village’ job
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Plus key rebindng and Controller Deadzone Sliders.

FuturLab has released the version 1.2 update for PowerWash Simulator 2, which adds the first entry in the “Caldera Chronicles” alongside various player-requested features, fixes, and quality-of-life improvements.

New features in the update include “Miniature Village,” a free new job available to all players; key rebinding, allowing players to remap their controls; and “Controller Deadzone Sliders,” which provide more precise input adjustments and stackable furniture in the Home Base for greater flexibility when organizing space.

PowerWash Simulator 2 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

Version 1.2 Update Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/powerwash-simulator-2-version-1-2-update-now-available-adds-miniature-village-job
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
